about.heading: Hey, I'm Daniel Zavala
about.paragraph: I merge technical skill with creative vision to build interfaces that look great and perform even better. Passionate about crafting digital experiences from concept to code.

highlights.title: Design Background
highlights.desc: Studied graphic design, animation & web — I see UI through a designer's lens.

highlights.title: Performance Driven
highlights.desc: Boosted performance by 50% and engagement by 30% at FreeAgent.

highlights.title: Team Leadership
highlights.desc: Led frontend teams and mentored devs — even taught JavaScript at a university.

highlights.title: Bilingual
highlights.desc: Fluent in English and Spanish — comfortable in international teams.

services.heading: What I do
services.tagline: Crafting digital experiences from concept to code.

items.title: Development
items.text: I drive projects forward using cutting-edge tools to craft dynamic and highly responsive web interfaces. Specializing in building exceptional user experiences, I focus on usability and optimal performance.

items.title: Responsive web design
items.text: I specialize in responsive web design, ensuring that websites adapt seamlessly to various devices and screen sizes. My focus is on creating intuitive and visually appealing user interfaces that provide an optimal viewing experience across all platforms.

items.title: User interface design
items.text: I excel in user interface design, creating visually stunning and intuitive interfaces that captivate users. My designs prioritize user experience, ensuring ease of navigation and interaction.

items.title: Experience Design
items.text: My expertise extends to experience design, where I craft immersive and engaging digital experiences. By combining user research, prototyping, and testing.

skills.heading: Skills
skills.tagline: Technologies and tools I work with daily.

experience.heading: Experience
experience.tagline: My path from design student to senior engineer.

items.title: UNISITE
items.text: As a student of Design, Animation, and Web, I acquired skills in graphic design, animation, and web development. Engaging in collaborative projects, I applied my knowledge in practical settings. Demonstrating an ability to grasp concepts, creatively solve problems, and quickly adapt to new technologies, I look forward to applying these skills in future professional opportunities.

items.title: ArtWeb
items.text: After spending a couple of years studying design, I decided it was time to apply my newfound knowledge in a job setting. Fortunately, I found a position where they designed and programmed websites. There, I learned to design everything from static pages to e-commerce platforms. Additionally, I discovered the world of programming, realizing I could merge my design knowledge with coding.

items.title: YouTube, Platzi, Acamica, Frontend Masters, Domestika, etc...
items.text: While working at Artweb, I began to immerse myself in front-end programming by studying everything I could find online. I enrolled in courses on platforms like YouTube, Platzi, Acamica, Frontend Masters, Domestika, and more. Through these courses, I learned how to translate my creativity into code, expanding my skill set and enhancing my capabilities as a front-end developer.

items.title: Java Training
items.text: During my research into programming, I stumbled upon a Java course at a university. The course lasted for six months, during which I gained valuable insights into the engineering mindset. I began applying this newfound knowledge to my subsequent work endeavors, enriching my approach to problem-solving and project development.

items.position: Web Designer, Front end, Team lead
items.title: Neubox
items.text: One day, Neubox needed a complete redesign of their website, so they hired me as a designer and front-end developer. At Neubox, I delved into UX and UI design, conducting user experience tests and revamping the entire brand's look. Later, I was appointed as a team leader for an internal project to develop a code-free website-building application. At Neubox, I honed my leadership skills, efficiently guiding the team towards project success.

items.title: Higher institute in information technologies.
items.text: To strengthen my development skills, I decided to teach programming at a university. As a professor, I mastered the art of teaching and guiding an entire group of individuals from knowing nothing about JavaScript to creating and hosting their own webpage. This experience not only solidified my understanding of programming but also enhanced my ability to effectively convey complex concepts to others.

items.title: FreeAgent
items.text: Once my English proficiency reached a sufficient level, I applied for a UI Engineer position at a startup in the USA. Fortunately, I secured the role. Upon starting work on the application, I encountered a UI disaster. Leveraging my accumulated knowledge over the years, I transformed the application, resulting in a visually stunning interface. Additionally, user engagement increased by 30%, and performance improved by 50%. My experience at Freeagent was extraordinary and greatly enhanced my English communication skills.

items.title: EPAM
items.text: At Epam, I encountered a new challenge working alongside high-level engineers. Each day, I delve deeper into programming and refine my leadership skills as I guide a team. This environment fuels my continuous learning, allowing me to expand my knowledge base and grow both personally and professionally.

contact.heading: Let's work together
contact.tagline: Have a project in mind or just want to say hello? Drop me a line and I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.footerNote: Based in Mexico · Available for remote work worldwide · Typically responds within 24h
